# @sirrlock/n8n-nodes-sirr — Sirr n8n Community Node

n8n community node for the Sirr ephemeral secret vault.
Provides a single node with resource/operation dropdowns covering the full Sirr REST API.

## Install

In n8n: Settings → Community nodes → Install → `@sirrlock/n8n-nodes-sirr`

## Credentials

Add "Sirr API" credentials: serverUrl + apiToken (sent as Bearer token).

## Node Operations

Resource: Secret
  - Get, Push, List, Delete, Prune

Resource: Audit
  - Query (since, until, action, limit)

Resource: Webhook
  - Create, List, Delete

Resource: Principal Key
  - Create, List, Delete

Resource: Me
  - Get, Update

Resource: Org
  - Create, List, Delete

Resource: Principal
  - Create, List, Delete

Resource: Role
  - Create, List, Delete

Resource: Server
  - Health Check

## Org Mode

All secret/audit/webhook/prune operations automatically route to
/orgs/{org_id}/... when an Organization ID is provided.

## Source

github.com/sirrlock/n8n
